AddPeerCluster.description: Grants permission to add a peer cluster to a multi-Region cluster

CreateCluster.description: Grants permission to create new clusters

DbConnect.description: Grants permission to connect to the database

DbConnectAdmin.description: Grants permission to connect to the database with admin role. Connecting with any other role requires DbConnect permission

DeleteCluster.description: Grants permission to delete a cluster and all of its data

DeleteClusterPolicy.description: Grants permission to remove the inline resource-based policy attached to a cluster

GetBackupJob.description: Grants permission to get the status of an Aurora DSQL cluster backup job

GetCluster.description: Grants permission to get information about a cluster

GetClusterPolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve the inline resource-based policy attached to a cluster

GetRestoreJob.description: Grants permission to get the status of an Aurora DSQL cluster restore job

GetVpcEndpointServiceName.description: Grants permission to retrieve the VPC endpoint service name for a cluster

InjectError.description: Grants permission to inject errors in targeted clusters

ListClusters.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of clusters

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list all tags on an Aurora DSQL resource

PutClusterPolicy.description: Grants permission to attach or update the inline resource-based policy attached to a cluster

PutMultiRegionProperties.description: Grants permission to update multi-Region properties of a cluster

PutWitnessRegion.description: Grants permission to configure and update the witness Region of a multi-Region cluster

RemovePeerCluster.description: Grants permission to remove a peer cluster from a multi-Region cluster

StartBackupJob.description: Grants permission to start a backup job for an Aurora DSQL cluster

StartRestoreJob.description: Grants permission to start a restore job for an Aurora DSQL cluster

StopBackupJob.description: Grants permission to stop a backup job for an Aurora DSQL cluster

StopRestoreJob.description: Grants permission to stop a restore job for an Aurora DSQL Cluster

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to Aurora DSQL resources

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from Aurora DSQL resources

UpdateCluster.description: Grants permission to modify cluster attributes

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

dsql:FisActionId.description: Filters access by the ID of an AWS FIS action

dsql:FisTargetArns.description: Filters access by the ARN of an AWS FIS target

dsql:WitnessRegion.description: Filters access by the witness region of multi-Region clusters
